PowerShell($pm = @\(\); foreach \($n in 'winget','choco','scoop'\) { if \(Get-Command $n -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { $pm += $n } } ; if \($pm.Count -eq 0\) { "none" } else { $pm -join ',' })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 25240 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $remaining = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'ngrok' }; if \($remaining\) { "STILL_RUNNING"; $remaining | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List } else { "CLEAN" })
